summary: Evaluation discipline is 57/100 across evidence, contradiction handling, learning, and regret control.

dimensions.name: Evidence Grounding
dimensions.note: Weighted signal trust is 65%; highest-risk gaps are proposals, sil, registry, git. External adapters: 0; proxy adapters: 14.

dimensions.name: Contradiction Discipline
dimensions.note: No contradictions detected in the current cycle.

dimensions.name: Outcome Learning
dimensions.note: Observed recommendation hit rate is 25%; signal trust is 65%.

dimensions.name: Regret Control
dimensions.note: Average regret is 0.62; lower is better.

dimensions.name: Counterfactual Discipline
dimensions.note: Counterfactual hit rate is 0%; opposite-branch wins are 33%.

dimensions.name: Experiment Depth
dimensions.note: Outcome/feedback tracking is only as good as intervention shape and observation quality.

dimensions.name: Feedback Loop Health
dimensions.note: Feedback loop strength is driven by direct intervention while execution follow-through remains the main limiter; reliability is 51% with founder truth 59%.

dimensions.name: Recommendation Precision
dimensions.note: 3/12 resolved outcomes were wins (25%). Precision below 50% — recommendations need calibration.

dimensions.name: False Certainty
dimensions.note: Platt ECE 0.006 (quality: strong). System is systematically overconfident — Platt correction applied.

dimensions.name: Rollback Quality
dimensions.note: No execution receipts yet — rollback quality unverifiable.

dimensions.name: Contradiction Recall
dimensions.note: No active contradictions — system is internally consistent.

dimensions.name: Execution Success
dimensions.note: 0/4 execution-linked outcomes were wins or mixed. Execution quality needs improvement before live widening.

recommendations: Increase external evidence coverage before trusting higher-autonomy execution.
Keep outcome observations resolving every score cycle so strategy authority remains earned.
Promote intervention-grade experiments over generic open hypotheses.
Use contradiction pressure, regret, and counterfactual misses together to cap certainty and assertiveness.
Capture founder approvals, defers, and overrides as first-class feedback signals.
Monitor Recommendation Precision and Execution Success to gate live execution widening.
Platt calibration (False Certainty) should reach ECE < 0.05 before IGNIS claims high confidence.
